# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for our complete application stack (VPC, EC2, RDS, S3, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure components. We'll add CloudWatch alarms and detailed monitoring after we deploy and verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true

  IGW:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    DependsOn: VPC

  AttachIGW:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref IGW

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [ 0, !GetAZs ]

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: PublicRouteTable
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref IGW

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    DependsOn: PublicRoute
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.11.0/24
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [ 0, !GetAZs ]

  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: ami-abc123
      InstanceType: t2.micro
      KeyName: !Sub '${AWS::Region}-keypair'
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1

  RDSInstance:
    Type: 'AWS::RDS::DBInstance'
    DependsOn: EC2Instance
    Properties:
      Engine: MySQL
      DatabaseName: mydb
      Username: admin
      Password: password123
      DBInstanceClass: db.t2.micro
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !GetAtt RDSInstance.SG
      PubliclyAccessible: true

  RDSInstanceSG:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Allow RDS incoming traffic
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        -
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
          FromPort: 3306
          IpProtocol: tcp
          ToPort: 3306

  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket

  ALBSecurityGroup:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup'
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Allow HTTP incoming traffic
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        -
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
          FromPort: 80
          IpProtocol: tcp
          ToPort: 80

  ALB:
    Type: 'AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::LoadBalancer'
    DependsOn: PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      Name: my-alb
      Subnets:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1

Outputs:
  RDSInstanceEndpoint:
    Value: !GetAtt RDSInstance.Endpoint.Address
    Description: Endpoint of the RDS instance

  ALBDNSName:
    Value: !GetAtt ALB.DNSName
    Description: DNS name of the load balancer
